mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rs_result_file ( owner_id, visibility, task_id, image_id, file_name, file_type, minio_bucket, object_key, file_size, mime_type, checksum, result_metadata, status ) VALUES ( #{ownerId}, COALESCE(#{visibility}, 'PRIVATE'), #{taskId}, #{imageId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{minioBucket}, #{objectKey}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{checksum}, CAST(NULLIF(#{resultMetadata}, '') AS jsonb), #{status} ) ON CONFLICT (task_id) DO UPDATE SET owner_id = EXCLUDED.owner_id, visibility = EXCLUDED.visibility, image_id = EXCLUDED.image_id, file_name = EXCLUDED.file_name, file_type = EXCLUDED.file_type, minio_bucket = EXCLUDED.minio_bucket, object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key, file_size = EXCLUDED.file_size, mime_type = EXCLUDED.mime_type, checksum = EXCLUDED.checksum, result_metadata = EXCLUDED.result_metadata, status = CASE WHEN rs_result_file.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rs_result_file.object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key THEN rs_result_file.status ELSE EXCLUDED.status END, workspace = CASE WHEN rs_result_file.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rs_result_file.object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key THEN rs_result_file.workspace ELSE NULL END, store_name = CASE WHEN rs_result_file.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rs_result_file.object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key THEN rs_result_file.store_name ELSE NULL END, layer_name = CASE WHEN rs_result_file.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rs_result_file.object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key THEN rs_result_file.layer_name ELSE NULL END, wms_url = CASE WHEN rs_result_file.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rs_result_file.object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key THEN rs_result_file.wms_url ELSE NULL END, wcs_url = CASE WHEN rs_result_file.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rs_result_file.object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key THEN rs_result_file.wcs_url ELSE NULL END, publish_error_message = NULL, published_at = CASE WHEN rs_result_file.status = 'PUBLISHED' AND rs_result_file.object_key = EXCLUDED.object_key THEN rs_result_file.published_at ELSE NULL END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, visibility, task_id, image_id, file_name, file_type, minio_bucket, object_key, file_size, mime_type, checksum, result_metadata::text AS result_metadata, status, workspace, store_name, layer_name, wms_url, wcs_url, publish_error_message, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rs_result_file WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, owner_id, visibility, task_id, image_id, file_name, file_type, minio_bucket, object_key, file_size, mime_type, checksum, result_metadata::text AS result_metadata, status, workspace, store_name, layer_name, wms_url, wcs_url, publish_error_message, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rs_result_file WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE rs_result_file SET owner_id = #{ownerId}, visibility = #{visibility}, image_id = #{imageId}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_type = #{fileType}, minio_bucket = #{minioBucket}, object_key = #{objectKey}, file_size = #{fileSize}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, checksum = #{checksum}, result_metadata = CAST(NULLIF(#{resultMetadata}, '') AS jsonb), status = CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' AND object_key = #{objectKey} THEN status ELSE 'PENDING_PUBLISH' END, workspace = CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' AND object_key = #{objectKey} THEN workspace ELSE NULL END, store_name = CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' AND object_key = #{objectKey} THEN store_name ELSE NULL END, layer_name = CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' AND object_key = #{objectKey} THEN layer_name ELSE NULL END, wms_url = CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' AND object_key = #{objectKey} THEN wms_url ELSE NULL END, wcs_url = CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' AND object_key = #{objectKey} THEN wcs_url ELSE NULL END, publish_error_message = NULL, published_at = CASE WHEN status = 'PUBLISHED' AND object_key = #{objectKey} THEN published_at ELSE NULL END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rs_result_file SET status = 'PUBLISHING', publish_error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('PENDING_PUBLISH', 'PUBLISH_FAILED')

UPDATE rs_result_file SET status = 'PUBLISHED', workspace = #{workspace}, store_name = #{storeName}, layer_name = #{layerName}, wms_url = #{wmsUrl}, wcs_url = #{wcsUrl}, publish_error_message = NULL, published_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE rs_result_file SET status = 'PUBLISH_FAILED', publish_error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
